from.description: Sender address. Must be a verified sender for the host's email provider — provider returns `sender_not_verified` if not.

provider.description: Optional provider hint (`ses`, `resend`, `sendgrid`, `smtp`). When unset, host uses its default-configured provider. Provider must be in `Capabilities.email.providers`.

fallbackOnFailure.description: When true and the primary provider returns a transient failure (5xx / network), host MAY retry via a fallback provider if configured. When false, transient failures surface as `email_send_failed`.
